feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Process Automation
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Process Automation Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Automation in SAP Public Cloud 2402
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,
Is automation possible in the SAP Public Cloud 2402?
If yes, I have a requirement to Automate the change in the material valuation class. It will include the following steps in sequence:
Step 1:
Reverse the open GR of the listed materials with the plant.
Step 2:
Delete the Open PO line items of the listed materials with the plant.
Step 3:
Clear the stock manually/inventory
Step 4:
Change the valuation class of listed materials with the plant.
Please let me know how can we achieve this.
Thanks in advance.

entry.title: "Uncaught TypeError" during "EnrichFinance" Step in "Business Partner Creation Approval Process"
entry.content:
We have imported and testing "Business Partner Creation Approval Process" live process project from SAP Build Process Automation Store.

We are able to reach until "EnrichFinance" step without any issues.

But on "EnrichFinance" step, when we're trying to add Bank or Tax Data in My Inbox task, nothing happens.

There are no calls being made to any URL.

But in Console, we see errors when we are clicking on "+" button

For Bank Data -

For Tax Data -

Upon navigation to the referenced Component-preload.js, we see below line of code in failed state -

onAddTaxNumber: function() {
                        var e = this.getParentModel().getProperty("/BPRequest/FinanceData/TaxData");
                        e.push({
                            TaxCategory: "",
                            TaxNumber: ""
                        });
                        this.getParentModel().setProperty("/BPRequest/FinanceData/TaxData", e);
                        this.getParentModel().refresh()
                    },

Trigger to the process -

We are triggering process via API. Below is our payload -

{
  "RequestId": "1718213572",
  "BPRequest": {
    "BusinessPartnerCategory": "2",
    "BusinessPartnerName": "Bhupesh LLC",
    "RolesData": [
      {
        "BusinessPartnerRole": "Z001"
      }
    ],
    "AddressData": {
      "Country": "IN",
      "PostalCode": "400101",
      "CityName": "Mumbai"
    }
  },
  "RequesterDetails": {
    "RequesterUserId": "P000001",
    "RequesterFirstName": "Bhupesh",
    "RequesterLastName": "Yadav",
    "RequesterEmail": "<hidden>"
  },
  "internal": {
    "isRework": false
  }
}

 Please let us know if we are missing anything.

entry.title: Create Context Attributes in Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a process that I want to add to visibility scenario.

I managed to create the visibility scenario itself,

But in the process I don't see the tab where I suppose to create the context attributes.

Do I need a specific role for that? Is it depend on a version or specific process?

Thanks

 

#Visibility Scenario

entry.title: SAP IAS User group patch action is not working from Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are using the Identity directory API for the Patch action of the group. I have created the user using IAS action, wanted to move the user to specific Group. From Business accelerator Hub I am able to move the user to desired group, but from action group it is giving me error 400.

I am following the below steps:

  1. Login to SAP Build Process lobby, navigate to action section.
  2. Add the Identity provider API Action Project.
  3. Add the Group Patch Action to the project
  4. And execute the Patch action with provided input as Group Id 
  5. And operation as "xxxxx", path as "xxxxx" and value as "xxxxx"

    Attached screenshot for your reference:

     

    ERROR: 

Could you please help me or any suggestion to resolve this issue?

Thanks,

Rupesh

entry.title: How to create the dynamic flow for approvers in process automation
entry.content:
Hi 

Need to know how to make a approver flow dynamic in process automation i.e there can n number of approvers for ex: In order 1 there will be L1 and L2 approver so process will go first to L1 then L2, next in order 2 there can be L1, L2,L3.....n 

We are starting the process with API in that there will be sending the Approver Levels So how can make this dynamic .

entry.title: Call external API from custom action in SAP Fiori Element
entry.content:
Hi,

I've developed a SAP Fiori Elements List report application. I need to call an external API when the user select a row in the list. I've defined a custom action but I don't know how to call external API

The API is the url for trigger a SAP Build Process Automation flow. So the requirement is trigger process automation flow when the user select a row in the list

Anybody can help me?

Thank you.

Piervincenzo.

entry.title: Destination for Live Process Projects
entry.content:
Hi,

I struggle to get the Destination for SAP Build Process Automation Live Projects Working, described here https://help.sap.com/docs/build-process-automation/sap-build-process-automation/configure-destination-for-live-process-projects?locale=en-US.

The destination looks like this:

When I check the connection it returns "Connection to "WM_CF_SPACE_PROVIDER" established. Response returned: "401: Unauthorized" ", so I assume that the URL is correct and its a matter of the user.

The User, used for the destination,  is available in the Subaccount and as a space member with role "Space Developer"

Could you please help me what is missing? Many thanks!

entry.title: SAP Intelligent RPA browser extension with Debugger active
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are trying to install SAP Desktop agent and SAP RPA browser extension on client machine, we realized that this SAP RPA browser extension has the Debugger functionality enabled  and client had raised questions around this.

1.Can this Debugger functionality can be removed from this browser extension ?

2.if not, Can SAP elaborate on why the debugger functionality cannot be removed.?

3.What is the debugger permission used for? 

Thanks,

Kumar

entry.title: Problem registering my desktop agent in my BTP Build Process Automation Trial Account
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm facing an issue while registering my Desktop agent in my BTP Trial Build Process Automation App.

I followed the SAP Developers Guide to set up the agent locally on my PC, and I enabled the Chrome and Edge extensions to try and connect the agent with my trial app. However, I encounter a problem when clicking on the agent in the control tower to get the information needed to register it with my local desktop agent.

It loads for hours without any response. I thought it might be due to my internet connection, but nothing changed after switching to another Wi-Fi network.

Can you please help me set this up?

Thanks,
Ilyass

entry.title: Integration SAP Build Apps with Process Automation without API
entry.content:
Hi SAP Builders,

I want to integrate SAP Build Apps with Process Automation to trigger a process without using an API, described here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/build-apps/service-guide/sap-build-library

Trigger a process in SAP Build Process Automation ... - SAP Community

Somehow this doesn't work in my case. I created a Process with API trigger with a variable as Process Input and published it to the Library

In SAP Build Apps the process was added succesfully

A page variable type "object" was added 

For the button i added the Trigger Process component and added the necessary properties:

What am I missing here?  The "old" way with the "Create Record" component works as expected.

Many thanks! Max

entry.title: Using Builds app process automation after deploy i am not able to see any data in my inbox.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I need your help i am not able to see the data in my inbox after submit the data.
please help where i can resolve this issue.

Thanks & Regards
Mohd Aakib

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation Email Search email activity stops working intermittently
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am new to Build process Automation and working on building the BOT which reads emails from one folder in outlook in unattended mode. It works well when i deploy the project however after some time it stops working. BOT keep on running but it does not find any email in search email activity.

Can you please suggest what can be the reason or where can I find the reason of this behavior? 

Thanks and Regards,

AP

entry.title: SAP BPA - Retrying a process instance does not trigger the actions
entry.content:
Hi all,

I've done an interesting observation the past week on the Build Process Automation monitoring tool - especially the 'Retry' functionality.

When retrying a process instance containing an action then the action is not execute instantly. Below are screen shots from an instance where a process is retried after action failure. But upon retrying the instance the action is not triggered - at least not within the first hour. 

Below is another example on a process instance that was retried - Six hours later the action was triggered.  

Above logs are on the same process - but two different instances. The first step of the process is an action - so we are not pending multiple steps before executing the action. When no action failure occurs then the process instance is executed within seconds.

The issue seems to only to occur upon retrying a process instance. 

Has anyone done the same observations on the retry functionality?

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation Error: DispInvoke: Range Error 0x800A01A8
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to run an automation where I have to set the values into the Excel worksheet. I got this error: 

DispInvoke: Range Error 0x800A01A8 

Failed Activity: irpa_excel.worksheet.setValues

Does anyone have any idea where the problem is coming from? What should I check to fix the error?

entry.title: SAP Build WorkZone MyInbox App - Local copy
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I would like to create a tile in Work Zone standard of My Inbox app with showAdditionalAttributes = true.

This requires me to create a local copy of My Inbox Html5 app.

Unfortunately, after that the Count at the tile stops working.

In the browser console I can see that there is Internal server error 500.

Do you have any ideas what could be the problem?

Thank you,

Patrik

entry.title: Can Build Process Automation Action treat Binary File?
entry.content:
Hello Experts.

I made an Integration Flow as This Blog.

The API has following parameters.

Parameter NameType
containernamequery parameterstring
Storage Account Namequery parameterstring
FileRequest Bodybinary file

In order to call this integration flow from Action of SAP Build Process Automation, I created an Action from Connector > Actions > Create > Build from Scratch.

And I defined API as following screenshot.

I enter connectivity and basic authentication information manually and it works fine

 

 

However there's no field to put the binary file to Request Body on Test Input Values.

Besides I called this API from "Automation" from process and there's no field for "file" of http body as well.

[Question]

Isn't there any way to deliver a binary file to HTTP Request body of API in SAP Build Process Automation?

I'm wondering that the values that can be handled in HTTP Request Body is only JSON format?

 

[What I investigated]

I referred this HELP but there's no information about binary file.

entry.title: Process automation Integration with microsoft graph
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are trying to integrate microsoft share point with SAP process automation. We had followed the guidelines as given in the documentation: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/graph/api/resources/sharepoint?view=graph-rest-1.0

For accessing Applications and relevant configurations and authorisation are set up in Azure including scope. Scope is added as per Microsoft documentation and the process works well from postman.

While trying to call the same via actions, Scope is added to additional properties of destination along with other properties required to be called in Actions.

A custom Action is created with variable as site where sitename is to be entered and domain as below:

Destination path: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0

Custom action end point: /sites/{domain}:/sites/{site}

However, while testing the action, it gives http 200 but it does not retrive any value.

The same however works from postman. We tried microsoft 365 SDK but it didnot work and hence we shifted to this method. Can anyone please suggest on this or if anyone has faced this issue before.

@SAPSupport1  @Archana 

Thanks

Tirthankar

entry.title: Mail Destination for SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi All,

As per below SAP help document, I have created destination (sap_process_automation_mail) for BPA.

https://help.sap.com/docs/build-process-automation/sap-build-process-automation/configuring-smtp-mail-destination

But when we are testing mail from BPA it is failing with below error. Only one thing i feel missing at M365 is "Redirect URI for BPA". Could you please guide how to build "Redirect URI " for SAP Build Process Automation". Please suggest if any thing i need to cross check at BTP side or M365.

Error message:The destination service did not return authorization data for destination 'sap_process_automation_mail' using authentication type 'OAuth2Password'. The error message returned was: 'AADSTS50034: The user account {EUII Hidden} does not exist in the  directory. To sign into this application, the account must be added to the directory.

Thanks,

Ramesh

entry.title: List binding to input of UI5 task as approval form not working
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I am trying to bind list of process context to the approval form which is an imported UI5 task that has a list input. The field is enabled and I am able to bind the list but not the individual fields.

Even if I try to map the individual fields it does not work. Below is declaration of the input in manifest.

But with a usual approval form there is no issue to bind.

Please suggest.

entry.title: Upload document/file to BTP DMS repository failed with status 400 using Node JS CAP application
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are trying to upload a document/file to BTP DMS Repository using CAP Application developed using Node JS, Below is code snippet :

we are using the above code and getting error with 400 status code on execution, by using the same URL we are able to post document to DMS repository using Business Accelerator HUB API. 

Could you please advice any solution to resolve error 400

Thanks,

Rupesh
